hero.title: Ba systèmes ya ingénierie oyo ezali monene
hero.subtitle: Enterprise Software · AI & Machine Learning · Infrastructure ya Cloud · IoT na Edge
hero.description: Banda na automatisation ya mayele tii na ba plateformes ya cloud, tobongisaka mpe topesaka tekinoloji oyo ezali kopesa nguya na ba kompani ya minene — na ngonga, na mbongo, na monene.
hero.trustLine: Bakompanyi ya mokili mobimba batyelaka yango motema

services.subtitle: Misala na biso
services.title: Ingénierie ya spectre mobimba
services.description: Bisika motoba ya entraînement. Ekipi moko. Couche nyonso ya stack ya technologie na yo — banda na ba appareils ya pembeni tii na tableau de bord ya entreprise.

customSoftware.title: Développement ya ba logiciels personnalisés
customSoftware.description: Ba applications ya sika etongami na microservices, API, mpe architecture native cloud.

aiMl.title: AI, ML mpe Business Intelligence
aiMl.description: Pipeline AI/ML, batableau ya Power BI, mpe analytique ya liboso oyo ebongolaka badonnée na bikateli.

cloud.title: Architecture ya Cloud mpe Infrastructure
cloud.description: Multi-cloud infrastructure with containers, serverless, and global scalability built in.

iot.title: IoT & Edge Computing
iot.description: Ba appareils connectés, mapasa numériques, mpe edge computing mpo na Industrie 4.0.

devops.title: DevOps & Platform Engineering
devops.description: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and observability from commit to production.

digital.title: Transformation digitale mpe conseil
digital.description: Stratégie ya technologie, ba roadmaps ya modernisation, mpe toli ya maboko.

cta.title: Tótonga eloko moko ya monene
cta.description: Banda na développement ya software ya personnalisé mpe biyano oyo esimbami na AI tii na infrastructure ya cloud mpe automatisation — topesaka misala ya technologie ya suka na suka oyo ebongisami na bamposa na yo.

credibility.subtitle: Lisolo na biso
credibility.title: Résultats, <gradient></gradient> bilaka te
credibility.description: Kobanda Sarajevo tii Oslo, Amsterdam mpe Berlin. Ba kompanyi ya kompanyi ezali kopesa yango na ngonga, na ntango nyonso.

atlascopco.label: Cloud IAM mpo na Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Atongaki infrastructure ya liboso ya One Identity oyo esimbami na cloud mpo na Atlas Copco na Azure Kubernetes, kokitisa talo ntango ezali kobatela botosi ya kompani.

orange.label: Plateforme ya cyberdéfense ya orange
orange.outcome: Développement ya infrastructure ya Azure Kubernetes, ba pipeline CI/CD, mpe bosangani ya ServiceNow mpo na kompani ya liboso ya cybersécurité na Europe.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: Kotonga plateforme ya GIS oyo ezali kolakisa misala ya nse ya mabele na Allemagne mobimba na détection ya collision mpo na kopekisa mbeba ya ba infrastructures ya bamilio ya ba euro.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub ezali kokamba bankoto ya ba appareils, Synapse ezali kosala bamiliare ya ba lignes ya telemetrie, na bosangisi ya edge kokitisa ntalo ya nsango na ~90%.

drone.label: Plateforme ya drone autonome
drone.outcome: Contrôleur ya mpepo oyo ezali na pont 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub oyo ekopesa nzela na ba mpepo ya BVLOS autonome mpo na kokengela bilanga mpe komema biloko ya misala.

payment.label: Sauvetage ya système ya kofuta
payment.outcome: Rescued failing payment gateway for Norwegian mobile app by reverse-engineering undocumented legacy code. Zero payment downtime post-modernisation.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: Atongaki plugin ya Maya oyo ekitisaki ntango ya kosala modele ya 3D na 50% na studio monene ya AAA, oyo endimamaki lokola esaleli ya standard na pipeline ya bozalisi.

social.label: Local-Based Social Platform
social.outcome: Architected dating app for Spain's nightlife scene with geolocation matching, real-time messaging, and push notifications for a UK client.

iga.label: Plate-forme IGA multi-locataire
iga.outcome: Built core backend for cloud-native identity governance platform serving Fortune 500 clients with custom ASP.NET Core Identity for NoSQL at enterprise scale.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Adjacent, Global Delivery
euAdjacent.description: Ngonga ya mosala ya CET na boyebi na Norvège, Pays-Bas, Allemagne, mpe bisika mosusu.

yourEngineers.title: Ba ingénieurs na yo, kasi ya moteki te
yourEngineers.description: Basali ya ekipi oyo bamipesaka na mosala na yo mpe na bisaleli na yo. Ba gestionnaires ya compte te, queue ya ticket te.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware to Cloud
hardwareToCloud.description: Kobanda na firmware ya appareil intégré tii na ba pipelines Azure Synapse ya entreprise. Ba software ya makasi na ba couche nionso.

partners.subtitle: Stack ya Technologie
partners.title: <gradient>Stack</gradient> ya bitumba
partners.description: Tosukaka kaka te na kosalela bisaleli yango, kasi totindaka bisaleli na yango. Banda na Microsoft Azure tii na Kubernetes, ba ingénieur na biso bazali na boyebi ya mokili ya solo.

cloudInfra.label: Cloud na infrastructure
cloudInfra.description: Architecture multi-cloud na orchestration ya conteneur mpe infrastructure lokola code.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.description: Ba cadres ya composant ya sika na libateli ya type mpe optimisé ya bisaleli ya kotonga.

backend.label: Backend na API
backend.description: Ba plateformes ya serveur ya grade ya entreprise, minoko ya systeme, mpe paradigme ya API ya sika.

data.label: Badonnée mpe kobomba
data.description: Relationnel, document, mpe in-memory stores with full-text search.

devops.label: DevOps & Tooling
devops.description: Pipeline CI/CD, contrôle ya version, mpe productivité ya développeur.

cloudNative.title: Cloud-Native by Default
cloudNative.description: Projet moko na moko ezali na conteneur, CI/CD, mpe etongami mpo na échelle horizontale banda mokolo ya liboso.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: From React frontends to .NET microservices to Kubernetes clusters — one team, end to end.

productionProven.title: Production-Proven
productionProven.description: Et non je n'ai pas les technologies demoiselles. Bisaleli nyonso oyo ezali na liste ezali na nguya na ba systeme ya solo oyo ezali kosalisa basaleli ya solo lelo.

faq.subtitle: Base ya boyebi
faq.title: Mituna oyo bato batunaka <gradient>mingi</gradient>
faq.description: Nyonso oyo osengeli koyeba mpo na kosala na Horizon Tech

scope.question: Mosala na yo ezali nini?
scope.answer: Topesaka ba projets ya technologie ya suka na suka: ba software ya kompanyi ya ndenge na ndenge, ba pipeline ya AI/ML, infrastructure ya cloud, ba systeme IoT, automatisation ya DevOps, mpe conseil ya mbongwana digitale. Soki ozali na mposa ya plateforme mobimba oyo etongami uta ebandeli to bosangani oyo ebongisami na stack na yo ya kala, tolandelaka architecture, développement, test, mpe déploiement.

stack.question: Technologie na yo ya makasi ezali nini?
stack.answer: Stack na biso ya core ezali na ba plateformes ya grade ya entreprise: Azure na AWS mpo na cloud, .NET na Node.js mpo na backend, React na Angular mpo na frontend, Kubernetes na Docker mpo na orchestration, mpe Terraform mpo na infrastructure lokola code. Tosalaka mpe mingi na Python mpo na misala ya AI/ML, Power BI mpe Fabric mpo na intelligence commerciale, mpe PostgreSQL, SQL Server, mpe MongoDB mpo na bansango.

enterprise.question: Ndenge nini osalaka ba projets ya kompani?
enterprise.answer: Boyokani nyonso ebandaka na eteni moko ya bolukiluki mpo na kolimbola eteni ya mosala, kotonga, mpe makambo minene. Ozali na ekipi ya bato oyo bazali na mokambi ya tekiniki, balandelaka makambo ya minene mbala na mbala, mpe ozwaka accès direct na ba ingénieur oyo bazali kotonga systeme na yo. Tolandaka ba sprints agile na ba démonstrations ya ba parties prenantes, tolandelaka baboard ya projet ya polele, mpe topesaka balapolo ya kokende liboso mposo nyonso.

support.question: Lisungi ya nsima ya lancement ezalaka ndenge nini?
support.answer: Topesaka batiers ya lisungi ebongisami na SLAs oyo elimboli, ata mpe kolandela 24/7, eyano na likama, optimisation ya performance, mpe ndenge ya kosala makambo mosusu. Boyokani na biso ya lisungi etaleli bobongisi ya bug, patch ya sécurité, komatisa ba infrastructure, mpe baekzamɛ ya kolongono ya nzoto — ebongisami na ngonga na yo ya mosala mpe ntango ya koyanola.

integration.question: Okoki kokotisa yango na ba infrastructures na biso ya sika?
integration.answer: Mpenza mpenza. Tozali spécialiste na modernisation ya libota, intégration ya API-liboso, mpe migration ya cloud hybride. Soki olingi connecter na ba systeme ya ERP on-premise, migrer kolongwa na monolithes kokende na microservices, to kokangisa babase de données ya kala na ba frontends ya sika, tozali na babuku ya migration mpe mayele ya intégration mpo na kokomisa yango kozanga mindɔndɔ.

industries.question: Misala nini osalaki na yango?
industries.answer: Ekipi na biso ezali na misala ya fintech, kolongono ya nzoto, logistique, e-commerce, energie, mpe misala ya leta. Tososoli mibeko ya industrie neti PCI-DSS mpo na kofuta mbongo, kotalela HIPAA mpo na bansango ya kolongono ya nzoto, kotosa GDPR mpo na bazando ya UE, mpe telemetrie na temps réel mpo na IoT industriel.

engagement.question: Mosala ya engagement ezalaka ndenge nini?
engagement.answer: Ebandaka na bokundoli mpo na koyeba mikano na yo mpe esika ya tekiniki. Na nsima, topesaka mokanda moko oyo ezali na batoli ya kotonga, manaka ya kotonga, mpe ndenge ya kotambwisa misolo. Soki endimami, tokobanda na ekipi ya bato oyo bamipesaka na mosala na yo, tokobanda na bisaleli na yo mpe na mosala na yo, mpe tokobanda sprint ya liboso na mikolo ebele.

faq.ctaDescription: Ozali na projet moko na makanisi? Tólobela ndenge ya kosalela mbongo, ndenge ya kosalela mbongo, mpe ndenge ya kosalela mbongo.
faq.readCaseStudies: Tanga ba études ya cas na biso
